ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-06-2008 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL, AND EXTENDING DISCOVERY CUTOFF IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A). THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 8/25/08 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET IN DEPT. 220 STARTING ON 8/18/08 AT 10:30AM. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WAS STIPULATED TO. ALL ECONOMIC EXPERT DISCOVERY IS TO BE COMPLETED 14 CALENDAR DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, INCLUDING DEPOSITION OF ECONOMIC EXPERT. THE PARED-DOWN LIST OF EXPERTS WILL BE FAXED NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL DATE. NO LATER THAN 12 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, EACH SIDE MAY IDENTIFY UP TO THREE EXPERT WITNESSES PERCEIVED TO BE NECESSARY TO BE DEPOSED FOR MEANINGFUL SETTLEMENT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: D.LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (D206)
